parts.text: Extract location from: Caption: Loved our lunch at L'Industrie Pizzeria in New York! The burrata slice is a must. Comments: []
Extract location from: Caption: Checking out this cute bagel spot in Soho today! Comments: ['This is Soho Bagels, they have amazing spreads!', 'Wait is that Prince Street?']
Extract location from: Caption: Trying out Joe's Pizza in NY. Comments: ['best slices in greenwich village']
